opportunities.description: SEEKING WORK | Germany | Remote (any time zone) Technologies: Anything. Very strong with TypeScript, frontend and backend. Dove deep into every frontend library/framework under the sun. I love Bun. Very strong with Rust. Have used all mainstream languages. I've built getinvoke.com - an open-source platform over the macOS accessibility DOM.
